commands.description: Additional canonical command ids beyond the default notify family (global notify.commands; max 128).
commands.title: maxItems(128)

enabled.description: Master switch for desktop notifications (global notify.enabled; default true).

thresholdMs.description: Minimum qualifying command duration in ms (global notify.thresholdMs; default 15000; 0 qualifies every eligible command).
thresholdMs.title: lessThanOrEqualTo(3600000)
